# Register map — nanosphere

3-axis (x/y/z) centre-of-mass feedback controller. Per-axis lock-in demodulation against a reference oscillator yields I/Q; PID drives a feedback force via the DAC. Reuses the core streaming + control header.


- Base address: `0x40000000`
- Data width: 32 bits
- Address span: `0x100` bytes (8 address bits)
- Registers: 36

| Offset | Name | Access | Reset | Fields | Description |
|--------|------|--------|-------|--------|-------------|
| `0x00` | `control` | rw | `0x1` | [0] sys_enable; [1] dac_enable; [2] phase_reset (reset all reference NCO phases) | Global control bits. |
| `0x04` | `magic` | ro (const) | `0xdeadbeef` |  | Bridge sanity constant. |
| `0x08` | `scratch` | rw | `0x0` |  | Software round-trip test register. |
| `0x0c` | `gate_cycles` | rw | `0x1312d0` |  | Lock-in integration window in clk cycles (10 ms at 125 MHz). |
| `0x10` | `threshold` | rw | `0x32` |  | Amplitude/sensitivity discriminator (codes). |
| `0x14` | `buffer_enable` | rw | `0x0` | [0] enable | bit 0 -> stream one record per gate. |
| `0x18` | `buffer_write_ptr` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Next circular-buffer slot the PL will write. |
| `0x1c` | `buffer_sample_count` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Monotonic total records written since enable. |
| `0x20` | `buffer_depth` | ro (const) | `0x400` |  | Circular-buffer depth in records. |
| `0x24` | `lockin_ref_tw_0` | rw | `0x0` |  | Reference-oscillator phase increment (mechanical mode frequency). |
| `0x28` | `drive_amplitude_0` | rw | `0x0` |  | Feedback drive amplitude scale (14-bit unsigned). |
| `0x2c` | `pid_setpoint_0` | rw | `0x0` |  | Target for the demodulated error signal (signed). 0 = cool to zero. |
| `0x30` | `pid_gains_0` | rw | `0x0` | [31:16] kp; [15:0] ki | [31:16] = kp, [15:0] = ki (Q4.12 signed). |
| `0x34` | `pid_output_0` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Latest PID feedback output (signed). |
| `0x38` | `lock_status_0` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | bit 0 = engaged/stable. |
| `0x3c` | `meas_mag_0` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Demodulated magnitude (lock_in error_count) for this axis — the PID error source. |
| `0x40` | `meas_i_0` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Latched in-phase (I) lock-in output for this axis. |
| `0x44` | `meas_q_0` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Latched quadrature (Q) lock-in output for this axis. |

| `0x54` | `pid_gains_1` | rw | `0x0` | [31:16] kp; [15:0] ki | [31:16] = kp, [15:0] = ki (Q4.12 signed). |
| `0x58` | `pid_output_1` | ro (in) | `0x0` |  | Latest PID feedback output (signed). |
